Date Expiry Spot

strike		 CE
9:16		 CE

9:16		 PE
3:29
The ATM strike is chosen from the 9:16 spot; the same Call & Put are then re-priced at 3:29. Times shown are the actual fetch times (the scheduler isn't second-precise). Values are last traded price.
Unofficial, for personal use. Source: NSE option chain via nsepython.
